vibe: Friday vibes — deep house, UK garage, city pop, electronic jazz. A slow-burn mix of lo-fi house warmth, broken beat jazz, and Japanese ambient beauty to ease into the weekend.

tracks.name: Equation
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Folamour and Chris Stussy — lush, sun-drenched house with a dreamy edge

tracks.name: Keep On
tracks.reason: Bridges Yussef Dayes and Nujabes territory — London jazz with hip-hop backbone

tracks.name: Coffee in the Morning
tracks.reason: Deep house with soul — sits right next to Jimpster and Kerri Chandler in the crate

tracks.name: Supurinkurah (Sprinkler)
tracks.reason: City pop royalty — connects to Taeko Onuki and Momoko Kikuchi in the rotation

tracks.name: Nova
tracks.reason: Spectral UK bass — pairs with the Massive Attack and Space Ghost late-night mood

tracks.name: Tidal Wave
tracks.reason: Jazz-funk-electronic fusion — bridges Yussef Dayes and Khruangbin vibes

tracks.name: When Radio Was Boss
tracks.reason: Deep dub-house from Stuttgart — kindred spirit to Moodymann and Osunlade

tracks.name: Sportsmen
tracks.reason: Japanese electronic pioneer — connects to Ryuichi Sakamoto and the city pop thread

tracks.name: Never Come Back
tracks.reason: Psychedelic electronic pop — sits between Tame Impala and Floating Points territory

tracks.name: Talk to Me You'll Understand
tracks.reason: Lo-fi house warmth — adjacent to Session Victim and Prospa's analog-digital blend
